text.title: DR Drill Script Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.description: Drill report says 'around 15 minutes'; cannot tell if RTO was hit.
antipattern.reason: Declaration step skipped; no clock started.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add explicit declaration step. Announce + capture timestamp. Restore step also timestamped.

antipattern.description: Engineer skipped 3 steps because 'they're obvious'; in real incident, on-call won't be that engineer.
antipattern.note: Fix: Discipline: verbatim execution. Log deviations + flag for post-mortem.

antipattern.description: Drill marked passed; later customer reports data missing.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add data-integrity check + transaction sample replay. Drill is not green until validation passes.

antipattern.description: Post-mortem published 6 weeks later; gaps already forgotten.
antipattern.note: Fix: Hard deadline: post-mortem in 7 days. Engineering leader signs off. Calendar reminder at day 5.

antipattern.description: Real-incident pager went off during the drill; support team thought it was real; customer-facing tickets opened.
antipattern.note: Fix: Announce to all stakeholders. Tag the drill ID in all comms. Publish 'drill ended' message at close.
